descriptionShort: Red Deer Kings junior hockey team roster updates and camp notes for the 1987 season, including goaltenders, defensemen, and forwards.
descriptionLong: The Red Deer Kings junior hockey team announced roster updates and player registrations for their 1987 camp. Notable goaltenders include Glenn Raeburn from Ferris State College and Lyle Mast from Fort Saskatchewan. The team features six veteran defensemen including Jason Edgar, plus returning forwards Dan Baker and Tim Willoughby. Newcomers include defenseman Kevin Forsen from the Hobbema Hawks and winger Bill Hardy from the Richmond Sockeyes.
